_comment_: Schema for empire-builder client config. Copy to clients/<slug>.json. Do NOT commit real configs with Telegram tokens to a public repo.
slug: REQUIRED — kebab-case, unique per client, e.g. 'manifestation-by-sarah'
community_name: REQUIRED — display name of the community

community.topic: REQUIRED — one-sentence description of what the community is about
community.audience: REQUIRED — who the ideal member is (specific, not 'everyone')
community.founder_story: REQUIRED — why the founder is building this (fuels all content)

offer_ladder: free lead magnet → paid community → 1:1 or group coaching

existing_assets: OPTIONAL — what's already live (bios, website, email list size)

brand.voice: REQUIRED — 3-5 adjectives, e.g. 'warm, direct, spiritually grounded, aspirational'
